summary: Social website and API for writing and running code.
editor_note: Putting running code inside a social feed sounds gimmicky until you try it. Every val is a URL, every function is deployable, and the product turns tiny scripts into shareable building blocks. That is a real bet against repo-first developer tooling. It feels closer to what Gists wanted to be than another serverless dashboard.
investors: Sequoia Capital Scout, Craft Ventures, Tom Preston-Werner
